name: @mrc2204/agent-smart-memo
description: Smart Memory Plugin for OpenClaw — structured slot memory with wiki-first memory capture/recall and migration compatibility tooling
author: mrc2204

scripts.build:all: npm run build:plugin && npm run build:core
scripts.package:plugin: npm run build:plugin && node scripts/prepare-package-target.mjs openclaw
scripts.package:core: npm run build:core && node scripts/prepare-package-target.mjs core
scripts.pack:plugin: npm run package:plugin && (cd artifacts/npm/openclaw && npm pack)
scripts.pack:core: npm run package:core && (cd artifacts/npm/core && npm pack)
scripts.publish:plugin: npm run package:plugin && node scripts/publish-target.mjs openclaw
scripts.publish:core: npm run package:core && node scripts/publish-target.mjs core
scripts.test: npx tsx tests/test.ts && npx tsx tests/test-auto-recall.ts && npx tsx tests/test-memory-config.ts
